MineralSite.name: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Cauchari JV Project in Argentina dated April 2019.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Cauchari JV Project in Argentina dated April 2019.pdf
document.description: This report provides an updated estimate of brine resources based on exploration work carried out between 2011 and December 2018 on the Cauchari JV Project in Argentina, with a focus on lithium and potassium minerals.
